title: hemionitis californica
intro: Hemionitis californica, also known as the California polypody, is a species of fern native to the western coast of North America. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Hemionitis californica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting healing in the body. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
